## Type of change

- [ ] 🛡️ New blocklist
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] Branch follows naming convention (`feat/`, `fix/`, `docs/`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/)

### If adding a new blocklist:

- [ ] The upstream list uses a permissive open-source license
- [ ] Added entry to `blocklist_sources.json` with all required fields
- [ ] Added row to the **Included Blocklists** table in `README.md`
- [ ] The source URL points to a plain-text domain list (no Adblock/Hosts format)
